candidateClaims.boundary: Older age and immunocompromise are separate risk contexts; this mapping does not quantify individual risk or imply uniform risk within either group.
Candidate process wording only. Exact timing and treatment language require current evidence and Australian clinical review.
General recommendation and programme orientation only; individual product and schedule decisions are excluded.
Applies to routine vaccination of close contacts; live-vaccine and severe-immunocompromise details require specialist review.
